nodes.context: Yakuza group founded by Shimizu Jirocho, later led by Kingo Tanabe and dissolved in 1961.
Yakuza group headed by Yasuo Takagi.
Yakuza gang that acquired the Shimizu emblem from Tanabe.

edges.evidence_quote: Tanabe sold the Shimizu emblem for circa tens of millions of yen to Yasuo Takagi (head of the Goryo-kai and thereafter the Mio-gumi gang).
edges.context: The Shimizu family sold its emblem to the head of Goryo-kai.

edges.evidence_quote: Tanabe sold the Shimizu emblem for circa tens of millions of yen to Yasuo Takagi (head of the Goryo-kai and thereafter the Mio-gumi gang).
